title: senecio hypochoerideus
intro: Senecio hypochoerideus, also known as Devil's mask, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Senecio hypochoerideus include its potential to ease colds and flu, while its herbal preparations often involve infusions or decoctions made from the leaves or roots. However, caution is advised when using this plant, as excessive consumption can lead to liver damage due to its pyrrolizidine alkaloid content.
